tools.Name: MinerU
tools.Description: A high-accuracy document parsing engine that converts PDFs, Office docs (DOCX, PPTX, XLSX), and images into structured Markdown/JSON.
tools.Use_Case: Converting complex scientific or professional documents into LLM-ready formats for RAG and agentic workflows.

tools.Name: CloakBrowser
tools.Description: A stealth Chromium binary that passes advanced bot detection by patching fingerprints at the C++ source level.
tools.Use_Case: Bypassing anti-bot systems in scraping tasks or automated browser testing without JS injection or configuration hacks.

tools.Name: Scientific Agent Skills
tools.Description: A collection of 135 ready-to-use scientific skills for AI agents, covering genomics, drug discovery, and data analysis.
tools.Use_Case: Transforming general-purpose AI coding agents into specialized research assistants for complex scientific pipelines.
